subcodes.first_line: You must not injure yourselves or commit suicide.... It is not permissible to do to yourselves what Mirza Hassan Afnan did to himself.
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @suicide, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @service to others; to the Cause of God
